title: TaCZ Magazines
description: A TaCZ addon that transforms the normal ammo system into a compatible magazine system for every gun and addon
body: ### Requires Timeless and Classics Zero _**No known incompatibilities**_ TaCZ Magazines is an addon for TaCZ that aims to make ammo more engaging to manage. You'll have to fill magazines to use a gun, giving you another step in progression as well as difficulty. Mags can stack up to 6 when they have the same ammo count, so it also frees up inventory space when used correctly. * Auto-generates magazines for every gun (if it uses one) based on ammo type and size of mag * TaCZ Addon support * Holding reload will let you select the mag you want to use *** **Report bugs or join for fun in the Zarra Studios Discord here: [https://discord.gg/PVd6GNpvtW](https://discord.gg/PVd6GNpvtW)** *** **Plans:** * **Disable the rendering of bullets in mag when mag is empty (done).** * **Add expanded mag variants (started).** * **Add config options, ex: switch what gun has priority mag model** * **Add mags to ammo workbench to craft** * **Small bugfixes/QoL** * **Maybe add support for TaCZ Arcana ammo types** *** A mod developed by Zarra Studios Please report bugs to the Discord or GitHub. **Code is open-sourced** #### **This code is licensed under ARR (for now).** **If you use this mod please provide a link to our original page (Curseforge or Modrinth)**
